prompt: 分析 roles/ 目录下的所有 SKILL.md，告诉我每个 skill 的核心流程有多少个步骤，以及它们的共同模式是什么。输出一个对比表格。

assertions.name: output_file_created
assertions.text: 分析结果文件 analysis.md 已创建

assertions.name: contains_table
assertions.text: 输出包含 markdown 表格

assertions.name: covers_all_skills
assertions.text: 覆盖了 roles/ 下所有 skill
assertions.expected: should mention architect, backend, frontend, qa, agile, explorer, devops, loop

assertions.name: step_counts
assertions.text: 每个 skill 都有步骤计数
assertions.expected: each skill should have a numerical step count mentioned

assertions.name: common_patterns
assertions.expected: should identify at least 2-3 common patterns across skills

assertions.name: plan_phase_visible
assertions.text: with_skill 版本展示了明确的计划阶段和成功标准
assertions.expected: should show structured plan with success criteria before execution

assertions.name: evaluate_phase_visible
assertions.text: with_skill 版本展示了评估阶段
assertions.expected: should show evaluation against predefined success criteria
